title: equisetum × litorale
intro: Equisetum × litorale, a hybrid of the Equisetum species, is a type of fern-like plant commonly found in wetlands and coastal areas. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Equisetum × litorale include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal purposes, although its use as a herbal remedy should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
